name: Diffusion Noised Teacher Forcing
author: Anthony Maio
blurb: Non-record: standard AR transformer with diffusion-inspired auxiliary loss. Input tokens are progressively corrupted (5-35%) during training; model minimizes interpolated clean/noisy loss. Trains stably on 8xH100 for 600s, achieving 1.2734 val_bpb. Answers OpenAI's interest in diffusion approaches.
